modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be distracting grammar usage and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help starting I-765 application for employment authorization.

full_description_text: User is trying to fill out the I-765 form. They are unsure how to begin. This is for employment authorization with USCIS. They need guidance on the initial steps.
short_description: Need help starting I-765 application for employment authorization.
description: User is trying to fill out the I-765 form. They are unsure how to begin. This is for employment authorization with USCIS. They need guidance on the initial steps.
